div.h1: Case-Insensitive Header Normalization: Before/After Buffer Transformation

g.text: Step 2 — tolower() loop: name[i] = tolower((unsigned char)name[i])
Step 3 — Strip OWS from value (lead + trail)

div.p: Invariant: All stored header names are lowercase ASCII. All lookups use lowercase keys. strcmp() suffices — no strcasecmp() needed at lookup time. Value case is PRESERVED (RFC 7230: header values are case-sensitive by default).

p.code: C o n t e n t - T y p e : …
C o n t e n t - T y p e \0

div.p: ⚠ Cast: (unsigned char) MANDATORY Prevents UB on chars > 0x7F

p.code: c o n t e n t - t y p e \0

div.p: n ≤ 32 entries · ~15 B/name All in L1 cache after first touch O(n) but faster than hash for n<32

p.code: if strcmp fails for all i:

div.p: Name: Content-Type ← mixed-case Sep: : OWS: (3 spaces) Value: text/html; charset=utf-8
name[]: content-type\0 ← all lowercase value[]: text/html; charset=utf-8\0 ← OWS stripped
